titleStmt.title: Zheng Shuzu Yunju guan shan men ti zi (rubbing)
雲居館山門題字（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Shuzu Yunju guan shan men ti zi. GENUINE Zheng Daozhao large-character title inscription. Part of 鄭道昭碑全集 series. Companion records (same inscription, other rubbing sets/portions): 244557, 244558, 244559, 244560. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Catalogued 565 (see Tianzhu caveat). Large-character title/dedicatory inscription associated with the Yunfeng/Tianzhu Daoist altar complex.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
